titleStmt.title: SII 38.17: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 17. (A.R. No. 17 of 1912.) KṚISHṆAPURAM, TIRUNELVELI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT. On the wall, left of entrance, Veṅkaṭāchalapati temple.

p.hi: King: Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1485: Krōdhana, Dvādasi, Wednesday, Anurādha = 1563 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. It records the grant of villages, Ariyakuḷam, Puttanēri, alias Tiruvēṅgaḍanallūr, Poṭṭaikkuḷam, Kōḍikkuḷam, Kuttukkal, Sīrāmaṉkuḷam, and Āḻikuḍi to the god Tiruvēṅkaṭanāthadēva as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam by Kṛishṇappa-Nāyaka, for the merit of his father Viśvanātha-Nāyaka of Kāśyapa-gōtra. It appears that the latter had obtained Tiruvaḍi-dēśa in which these villages were situated, as amaranāyakam from Rāmarāja-Aiyyaṉ. It is stated that Kṛishṇappa Nāyaka made this gift, on the occasion of dvādaśi on the bank of the river, Tāmraparaṇi in the presence of the god Nellainātha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmaka kaṇṭa
koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ dakṣiṇa paścimevuttara catu samudrādhipati śrīvira śrīsadāśivadeva mahārāya
priddhavirācyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 10 485ṉ mel cellā
niṉṟa krodhana [ samvasarattu midhana] māsattu Āṭi ttu dvādaśiyum budhavāramum Anurādha nakṣatramum peṟṟa śubha yo gattu nāḷ tiruvaṭi
deśam śrī rattu tiruveṅkaṭa śrī gotram viśvanātha nāyakkar putran kraṣṇanappaṉāyakkar
m ppittadhanma namappaṉ Ayya namakku Irāmarāja Ayyaṉ Avarkaḷ kamaranāyakkattukku pālittaruḷiṉa tiruvaṭi deśattil kiḷat ḷaita
nam brahmadeśam civalavaṉ maṅkalam paṟṟu nañcai puñcai ṉilattuḷ piṭākai Ariyakuḷam putta neriyā
ṉa tiruveṉkaṭanallūr poṭṭaikkuḷam Uḷḷiṭṭa koṭikkuḷam kuttukalcirāmaṉ kuḷam puñcai puṉalkuḷam Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟukku
ṉā Iperuṉā(ṉa)ṅkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ peruṅkālukkum māyakkūttaṉ tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāṉa Āca pāttu melai
rumpukkum Aṉavarataṉanallūrellaikkum paṭa t te cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kālukku
viṭṭalāpurattukku viṭṭa Ayyaṉkuḷattu Ellaikku meṟku teṉ Ellai Umai dvādaśakattu vaṭakku mel Elkai muttūr Elkaikkum
tiṉṉippoṟṟai Iṭamalaikkum Aḻakiyamaṉṉaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa cavaḷakkāṟaṉ kuḷattelkaikkumi parānticcuramuṭaiyanāyiṉār tevatāṉa
māṉa neṭuṅkuḷam puḷiyaṅkuḷattelkaikkum pirāmaṇa(ṉa)ṅ kuḷamāṉa turaṇava nerippuravukkum Ariyakuḷattukkum yiṟ kālukku kiḻakku vaṭayellai k
karuṇākarappererip puravukkum Oṟṟai Aracaṉkuḷattu pāḷikkuṭi kaḷḷakuḷattuppuravukkum kiḻmelp peruvaḻippala ciṟṟukkum parānticcuramuṭaiyār nayi
ṉār tevatāṉamāṉa puḷiyaṉaṅkuḷattelkaikkum teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉkelkaik kuḷappaṭṭa puñcai puṉak kuḷaṅkaḷum murammaṉāṭṭu Āḻikuṭiyil cittila
rai § cantiraṉukku Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruvūṟil koṇṭaruḷumpaṭikkum tiruvārātaṉattuk kumpiṭṭuk kuṭutta toppum Aḻaviṉ
pa ṭaṉilam � yum paṭaceriyumāka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaikkuḷavappaṭṭa Ariyakuḷam puṟaka neriyakaṉ tiruveṅkaṭanallūr poṭṭaikkuḷam Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟum
k kuḷam kuttukkal cirāmaṉkuḷam puñcai puṉṟakuḷam Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟum Āḻikuṭiyil Aḷaviṉpaṭa nilam �yum paṭaceriyum svāmi tiruveṅkaṭa
devariku śrīmat kāśyapagotram viśvanādhanāyakkar putran kraṣṇappanāyakkar dvādeśi puṇya kālattile tāmbraparaṇi tirattile nellaiṉādhar
sannadhiyile nammuṭaiya takappaṉār viśvanādhanāyakkarukku puṇyamāka sahiṇyodaka dhārāpurvamāka tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka samma
Inta tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkuc cellukiṉṟa nidhiniṣepa tarupāṣāṇā pūṇyāgānma siddhasāddhyāmennayapaṭṭa Aṣṭa�
ḷum U nādhivinimam vikriyam kaḷukku yogyākacabrārka sthāyiyāka tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka devadāṉabrahma
mna vākac cempilum(ñ) cilaiyilum veṭṭi kaiyyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭi sarvvamānnyamāka Aṉubhavikkattakkatāka svāmi tiruve
ṭanāthadevaṟku śrīman kāśyapagotram viśvanādhanāyakkar putraṉ kraṣṇappaṉāyakkar simappita yanmaśāsanam
Digital edition of SII 38.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
